_status: SAMPLE — renderer demo. Matt voice-check before any publication.
_compliance_note: Joke is on the view-vs-perception math, not on the people. Geographic origin is not a protected class. Stay observational.
tell_line: Tell me you're a Bend transplant without telling me. I'll start. You said the Cascades view sold you on the lot. The view is a four-mile-out distant ridge.
